body:
Continued the keys+smith pass: SLS(72) -> SLS(75)/9.89.

WARRANT#68 (forge-indicate r4): found SelfCalibrateConvictionEngine already implements a real Brier-scored reliability curve predating the thesis -- formalized it in forge vocabulary instead of building a redundant second one.
WARRANT#69 (forge-edge-2 r6): composed the existing posterior-edge + capped-Kelly formulas into one decision function (Convergence Sigma), still pure/uncalled.
WARRANT#70 (keys-3 item 15 remainder): episode dwell measurement, backward-only scan, explicitly no-lookahead.
All 3 compiled 0 errors, diff-verified non-regressive.

BIGGER FINDING per your log-mining instruction: the economic-events feed (TUNGSTEN_events.csv) had been stale since 2026-07-03 -- every single calibration run across 6 days and 4 builds traded fail-open with zero real event awareness. Root cause: update-tungsten-events.ps1 skips its refresh forever whenever a Claude session happens to be running, with no catch-up path. Fixed both the data (refreshed live via WebSearch: FOMC, GDP, PCE, jobless claims, BoJ, ECB, BoE through Aug 2) and the script (now overrides the skip once the feed is 10+ days stale).

Also corrected a universality gap per your note that TUNGSTEN isn't USDJPY-only: the events-refresh skill was wrongly scoped to USD/JPY only -- fixed to cover all 7 majors (USD/EUR/GBP/JPY/CHF/AUD/CAD) every refresh, matching the currency-strength system's own already-universal design.

Crash investigation on "Terminal closing": checked Windows System/Application/TaskScheduler logs around both 2026-07-18 close timestamps -- no correlating event found in either window. Root cause still open; most likely a manual close or silent security-software action, neither confirmable from here.

Real stopping point reached for warrant-shipping: what's left (forge-indicate's Sigma-gate assembly, Keys-3's structure-sequencing item 16, scale selection item 18) needs either a completed live run or a substantially larger dedicated build, not another bounded slice. Attaching final SLS(75) mq4+ex4, the updated forge_ledger.json, and the refreshed TUNGSTEN_events.csv.
